hero.title: Σχετικά με το EviDive

mission.title: Η αποστολή μας
mission.description: Το EviDive γεννήθηκε από ένα κοινό πάθος για την κατάδυση και την τεχνολογία. Η αποστολή μας είναι να συνδέσουμε τους δύτες σε όλο τον κόσμο με τις καλύτερες υποβρύχιες εμπειρίες.

values.title: Οι αξίες μας
values.subtitle: Οι αρχές που καθοδηγούν κάθε απόφασή μας

trust.title: Εμπιστοσύνη
trust.description: Επαληθευμένα κέντρα και αυθεντικές κριτικές για ασφαλή κράτηση.

safety.title: Ασφάλεια
safety.description: Αυστηρά πρότυπα και σαφείς απαιτήσεις για κάθε κατάδυση.

community.title: Κοινότητα
community.description: Μια κοινότητα ενθουσιωδών που μοιράζονται τις ανακαλύψεις τους.

team.title: Η ομάδα μας
team.description: Μια ομάδα ενθουσιωδών της κατάδυσης και της τεχνολογίας με έδρα την Ελβετία.

vision.title: A connected and ethical adventure
vision.description: EviDive is also a community of enthusiasts. Our vision: to make diving an inner and outer journey that is connected, ethical and unforgettable.

items.title: Instant booking
items.description: Check real-time availability and book in just a few clicks.

items.title: 100% free for centers
items.description: No registration or subscription fees for partner centers.

items.title: Verified reviews
items.description: Build your reputation with authentic reviews from real divers.

items.title: Global visibility
items.description: Get known by divers from around the world.

terms.title: Όροι χρήσης
terms.intro_text: Welcome to EviDive. By accessing our website, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. Please read them carefully.
terms.services_text: EviDive provides a platform for booking diving experiences and courses. We act as an intermediary between divers and diving centers.
terms.bookings_text: Bookings are subject to availability and confirmation by the diving center. Cancellation policies vary by center and offer type. Please review specific terms during booking.
terms.liability_text: Diving involves inherent risks. You must be certified and medically fit to dive. EviDive is not liable for accidents or incidents occurring during activities booked through our platform.

privacy.title: Πολιτική απορρήτου
privacy.collection_text: We collect personal information necessary for your bookings, including name, email, and certification level. We may also collect usage data to improve our services.
privacy.usage_text: Your data is used to process bookings, communicate with you, and personalize your experience. We share necessary details with diving centers for your reservations.
privacy.protection_text: We implement security measures to protect your personal information. We do not sell your data to third parties.
privacy.cookies_text: We use cookies to enhance navigation and remember your preferences (like language settings). You can control cookie settings in your browser.

suspendedWarning.title: Center deactivated
suspendedWarning.description: Your center is currently deactivated and does not appear in searches. You can reactivate it from the danger zone.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emailOnNewBookingDesc: Receive an email for each new booking request.
notifications.emailOnCancellationDesc: Receive an email when a customer cancels their booking.
notifications.emailOnNewReviewDesc: Receive an email when a customer leaves a review for your center.
notifications.smsOnNewBookingDesc: Receive an SMS for each new booking (requires a verified phone number).
notifications.smsRequiresPhone: Add a phone number to your center to enable SMS notifications.
notifications.dailyBookingReminderDesc: Receive a daily summary of the day's bookings.

cancellation.title: Cancellation Policy
cancellation.flexibleDesc: Free cancellation up to 24h before. Full refund.
cancellation.moderateDesc: Free cancellation up to 48h before. Partial refund after.
cancellation.strictDesc: Free cancellation up to 72h before. No refund after.
cancellation.hoursDesc: Number of hours before the dive where cancellation is free.
cancellation.refundDesc: Percentage refunded if cancellation occurs after the free deadline.
cancellation.invalidHours: Deadline must be between 0 and 168 hours.

payment.title: Payment
payment.stripeConnectedDesc: Your Stripe account is connected. You can receive payments.
payment.stripeNotConnectedDesc: Configure Stripe Connect to receive customer payments.
payment.comingSoon: Stripe integration will be available soon.
payment.ibanDesc: Bank details for manual transfers (informational only).
payment.commissionDesc: of each booking goes to you
payment.commissionReadOnly: This rate is set by the EviDive administrator and cannot be modified.

team.title: Team
team.description: Manage your team members and their access.

danger.title: Danger Zone
danger.description: These actions are irreversible or have significant consequences.

deactivate.title: Deactivate center
deactivate.description: Your center will no longer be visible in searches and will not be able to receive new bookings. Existing bookings will be preserved.

reactivate.title: Reactivate center
reactivate.description: Your center will become visible in searches again and will be able to receive new bookings.

delete.title: Permanently delete center
delete.description: This action is irreversible. All data related to your center will be permanently deleted.
delete.hasActiveBookings: Cannot delete: you have active upcoming bookings.

card.cannotDeleteWithBookings: This member cannot be deleted because they have associated bookings. You can only deactivate them.
